final_prompt.prompt: 35mm film portrait photography, soft and airy aesthetic, natural film grain with gentle texture, dreamy pastel color grading, young woman with delicate facial features, soft luminous skin with natural pores and subtle warmth, loose flowing hair catching gentle light, minimal effortless styling, relaxed serene expression with soft gaze slightly off-camera, lips gently parted in quiet contemplation, wearing lightweight linen or cotton fabric in muted ivory or soft blush tones, gentle folds and drape of fabric, relaxed natural posture with slight shoulder tilt, arms loosely at sides or softly framing face, diffused natural window light from camera-left, soft wrap-around fill light eliminating harsh shadows, gentle rim light outlining hair with warm golden haze, airy overexposed highlights on skin creating ethereal glow, shallow depth of field with creamy smooth bokeh background, blurred soft neutral background suggesting indoor or outdoor natural setting, muted warm tones with slight fade, lifted shadows, gentle vignette at edges, timeless intimate mood, quiet emotional stillness, 35mm Kodak Portra 400 film emulation, authentic analog warmth, fine grain structure, soft focus rendering without digital sharpness, photorealistic skin texture, no plastic skin, no over-sharpening, no harsh contrast, no watermark
Cinematic dreamy 35mm portrait, soft natural light, gentle bokeh, film grain, airy pastel tones, intimate close framing.

A soft and airy 35mm film portrait of a young woman standing in gentle natural light, captured with a classic analog camera aesthetic. The scene is bathed in warm, diffused afternoon sunlight filtering through sheer curtains, casting delicate shadows across her face. Her expression is calm and introspective, with loose strands of hair framing her features naturally. The color palette leans toward creamy whites, soft peaches, and muted pastels, evoking a timeless, dreamy mood. Shallow depth of field renders the background into a smooth, feathery bokeh of blurred foliage or interior tones. Film grain is subtly present, adding organic texture without overwhelming the image. Photorealistic, 35mm analog film, soft focus, 8K, high resolution, masterpiece.
Negative Prompts: no harsh shadows, no oversaturation, no digital sharpness, no plastic skin texture, no lens flare artifacts, no watermark, no text, no extra limbs.
Aspect Ratio: 2:3.

Soft dreamy analog portrait editorial, a young woman with delicate features and gentle expression, minimal natural makeup with loose flowing hair and simple light-colored clothing, Rinko Kawauchi style intimate 35mm film photography, standing near a window or open field with shallow depth of field and soft background bokeh, diffused natural daylight with warm golden undertones creating an airy ethereal mood
